data.title: Fruit farmers in Xi County, China use digital tech to grow Yulu fragrant pears with ease, boosting industry growth.
data.description: In a familiar scene in Xi County, located in Shanxi Province in northern China, fruit farmers are able to conveniently irrigate and fertilize their Yulu fragrant pear orchards with a simple tap on their cellphones. This efficient method is a routine practice in the region, known for its prestigious history of pear cultivation. The innovative technology allows farmers to manage their orchards with ease, enhancing productivity and ensuring the health of the crops.

data.title: H2O.ai partners with Certis to enhance AI deployment in security and operations, aiming to improve decision-making and safety.
data.description: In Singapore, H2O.ai, a prominent firm in sovereign AI, and Certis Group, a top integrated solutions provider, recently entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU). The agreement aims to expand AI utilization within Certis, concentrating on agentic and predictive capabilities in operational settings. This collaboration is set to enhance operational resilience, improve decision-making processes, and bolster safety measures in intricate infrastructures.

data.title: Stocks and cryptocurrencies rose as Trump canceled tariffs linked to Greenland. S&P 500 up, Bitcoin and Ether see slight gains.
data.description: On Wednesday, the S&P 500 index saw an increase in value, while cryptocurrency stocks showed varied performance. Both Bitcoin and Ether experienced slight gains after former President Donald Trump decided to cancel the tariff warning. The exact figures for these market movements were not specified.

data.title: Tencent Cloud highlights AI accessibility at Davos WEF, with Dowson Tong emphasizing value at World Economic Forum.
data.description: In Davos, Switzerland on January 21, 2026, during the World Economic Forum (WEF) Annual Meeting, Dowson Tong, the Senior Executive Vice-President of Tencent and CEO of Tencent Cloud and Smart Industries Group, highlighted the significant impact of artificial intelligence.

data.title: Kickstarter and Creator Camp collaborate to sponsor wide theatrical release of film Two Sleepy People, advocating for community-backed cinema.
data.description: A crowdfunded campaign by Kickstarter has enabled the widespread theatrical debut of the film "Two Sleepy People" in Austin, Texas. This initiative showcases the power of community-supported cinema projects. The campaign, held in January 2026, was a collaboration between Kickstarter, a prominent crowdfunding platform, and Creator Camp, a filmmaker-led studio. This partnership has emphasized the potential for creative ventures of various scales to succeed with the backing of the community.

data.title: Cryptocurrencies rally as Trump withdraws Greenland tariff threat with Bitcoin +1.32% at $90,068.10, Ethereum +1.99% at $3,019.96, XRP +2.98% at $1.96, Dogecoin +1.77% at $0.1274. Market sees over $630 million liquidated in the last 24 hours.
data.description: Cryptocurrencies surged as stocks rose following President Trump's tariff reversal on Europe. Bitcoin increased by 1.32% to $90,068.10, Ethereum by 1.99% to $3,019.96, XRP by 2.98% to $1.96, Solana by 2.42% to $130.47, and Dogecoin by 1.77% to $0.1274. Bitcoin broke its week-long losing streak, crossing $90,000, while Ethereum passed $3,000 amidst the market's uptick. Over $630 million was liquidated in the past 24 hours, evenly clearing leveraged long and short positions. Notably, Bitcoin's open interest decreased by 0.35% recently. Stocks of related companies like Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) and Bitmine Immersion Technologies Inc. (NYSE: BMNR) closed up 2.23% and 3.93%, respectively.
